rationale: Educ. Code §18.003 governs Job Corps diploma program curriculum authority and is wholly unrelated to the Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amount. No conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 18.003. AUTHORITY. A Job Corps diploma program may offer a secondary school curriculum, a high school diploma program, and a General Educational Development program.
_note: Rule text concerns Job Corps education programs; no bearing on homestead exemption or property tax appraisal.
